## Type of change
- [ ] New specialist agent
- [ ] Improvement to an existing agent
- [ ] App feature / fix (`index.html`)
- [ ] Docs

## Checklist
- [ ] No new build tooling or runtime dependencies were added
- [ ] Tested at a mobile viewport width
- [ ] For a new agent: file lives at `agents/<division>/<id>.md` and is registered
      in the `AGENTS` array in `index.html` (`id` matches the file name)
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
